item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 807

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @the9mm painted this mug and I think it's really cool. Check out her posts to see lots of awesome stuff she does.
27 Man Tax: Harrison Ford
“For myself, I am an optimist — it does not seem to be much use being anything else.” - Winston Churchill So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: wedorecover

item.title: KITTY!
item.description:
Y'all. It has been a DOOZY. Ms. Kitty, as all of you know is my inside bowling ball. She used to be outside but ever since the ear infection that caused her permanent head tilt she has been scared to go out. Sometimes she'll venture to the stoop if I have the door open but never further. Well I guess she was outside and I accidentally closed her out before the trash truck passed Thursday morning and she must have gotten spooked. Didn't notice she was missing until Thursday afternoon. Called her , searched for her, nothing. I did that multiple times a day and never saw or heard from her so by yesterday I had pretty much given up hope. I was outside with Darwin and I heard her meow, it's very specific. And I found her in the fence line of my backyard property!!!
She is so happy to be back inside. Last night she kept coming find me in bed and meowing for me to pet her. She couldn't contain her excitement
My girl!!! So glad she's safe.
item.dc:creator: vudumommajuju

item.title: Soft light, warm tones… and a little moment to share
item.description:
Today, I decided to share a recent shoot with you — one filled with tenderness, light, and warmth.
All photos are mine. I also post more of my work on Patreon and Instagram, if anyone wants to take a look✨ Patreon — https://patreon.com/catarsic?utm_source=imgur Instagram — https://www.instagram.com/catarsic/
item.dc:creator: svgoncharov

item.title: Let's have a gay time
item.description:
Queer Mexicana by @KaiLysander
A reminder for why the L comes first in LGBTQ+ ? It’s not random — it’s history. Lesbians were on the front lines caring for gay men during the AIDS crisis, showing up when governments and systems didn’t. Putting the L first is about recognition, respect, and honouring that solidarity. ✨ Know the history. Respect the community. WE LOVE YOU LESBIANS
I know it's not pride month. I don't care. It's pride 24/7, 365
Credit: @peterparkerhasbigbongos
item.dc:creator: cryptidofthewood

item.title: Happening TODAY in Texas!
item.description: "call to arms" "virus in your community" Know the key words/phrases are being used to manipulate your views by these fascist corpo asshats. Their tactics have never changed. They will always use threats/fear/blame to persuade you to give your own freedom away. Then when you will protest about your loss, they will turn and say - "you wanted this, you voted for this" Don't let them.
item.dc:creator: TheLastSpaceman

item.title: MAMDANI: “The wealth of a median white household in the city is more than $200,000, while that of a black household is less than $20,000 …
item.description: MAMDANI: “The wealth of a median white household in the city is more than $200,000, while that of a black household is less than $20,000 … We are reckoning with the long history of racism here and starting to act upon a framework that puts equity right at the center of it.”
item.dc:creator: jee22

item.title: Candle Ice
item.description: Candle ice, also known as rotten ice, is a fragile form of ice that develops in vertical, honeycomb-like columns. It occurs in early spring as sunlight and warming temperatures unevenly melt thick lake ice, causing the ice to break into vertical crystals rather than melting as a solid sheet.
item.dc:creator: flukeysnail

item.title: Satisfying Dump about quality shoes. Have a better day !
item.description:
2 hours to get this customers shoes finished before closing.
Algumas coisas de qualidade podem ser reparadas. Quality things may be reparated.
Emerald green patina at its finest.
Italian Shoes.
Ultimate shoe shine.
Proper Leather Shoe Shine Experience.
Restoration of an old shoe.
2,000-year-old Roman children's shoes found in the ruins of Palmyra. The leather and craftsmanship are still visible.
Buttoning shoes in the past.
Speed hooks for shoelaces on work boots.
Lost art of Handmade Shoe making.
Process of making $600 Handmade shoes.

item.title: Ukrainian forces struck BOTH “Admiral Essen” and “Admiral Makarov” in Novorossiysk, these aren’t patrol boats, these are missile carriers
item.description: Each one worth hundreds of millions, capable of launching cruise missiles at Ukrainian cities, and now both sitting damaged or worse Hitting them in port makes it even worse for Russia, that’s supposed to be the SAFE zone This isn’t just damage, it’s capability being taken off the board, and that hits both the fleet AND strike capacity at the same time
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Church is left and then right!.
item.dc:creator: Zakiamon

item.title: Secret MEME Dump, Hidden On My Phone. Tuesday Wild Meme Dump #490
item.description:
1
2. Men have secrets too
3. I don't think anyone noticed
4
5
6
7. This is why humans lost the Great Emu war
8
9. Wow, they can read your paper from space! Insane zoom
10
11
12. You probably wondering how I got here
13. Guys and gals, gimme a selfie in the comments, I will upvote every single one
14. Imagine impressing the T-1000
15. Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working on games in the past few years. From scratch basically we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our fourth game is almost 40% done and the demo was played by streamers from all of the world! It's based on The Milgram Experimenter and I hope it's not too much to ask for a wishlist on Steam, it would mean the world to us: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment We are also committed to not using gen AI for the game, no AI art, no AI music, no AI voices. ! Have a great week everyone! : )
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
